content.speakerText: What’s your plan for the afternoon?
expectedAnswers: I’ll be finalizing the budget slides and hopping on a call with marketing.
Just wrapping up the project update and checking in with the team.
Nothing big—just replying to emails and preparing for tomorrow’s presentation.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明了下午的工作重点
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词短语（finalizing, wrapping up, preparing）
表达自然度：使用了地道口语表达（hopping on a call, nothing big）
关键词覆盖：包含至少两个职场任务关键词（slides, email, update, call, presentation）
